name: The Blood Accord
title: Covenant that binds every red card that ever was

abilities.name: Seal the Pact
abilities.text: All your cards gain Resistance to the opponent's highest-DMG type.

abilities.name: Invoke the Accord
abilities.text: Deal 200. Heal every one of your cards to full.

typed_abilities.name: Seal the Pact
typed_abilities.text: All your cards gain Resistance to the opponent's highest-DMG type.

typed_abilities.name: Invoke the Accord
typed_abilities.text: Deal 200. Heal every one of your cards to full.

flavor_text: No red card may strike another while the Accord stands. Yet here she is.
